adversarial_concerns: Market implies lower probability (75.5%) despite forecaster's 80% confidence; divergence may reflect unaccounted risks like franchise fatigue or late-negative reviews
Assumes score stability near-final without evidence; Rotten Tomatoes scores can shift unexpectedly even late-stage
Base-rate neglect: High scores for sequels are rare despite franchise popularity
current.rationale_summary: At 94% with 100+ reviews, ~2pt cushion above 92 and near-final; RT rarely moves >2-4pts late. Trimmed for recent 92<->94 bounce on the line + franchise-low/diminishing-sequel downward drift.
reference_classes: low-90s RT with 100+ reviews late drift
